title: DemoFit Supplement Finder — local smoke test

voice.instructions: Friendly founder, upbeat and clear. Brisk, confident pace.

scenes.narration: Looking for the right supplement? Just tell DemoFit what you need.

scenes.narration: It finds matching products and shows price per serving, so the best value jumps right out.

scenes.narration: Then check out in a single click. No forms, no friction.
